text: Being here fills me with a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The clean, structured lines and reflective glass create an environment ripe for contemplation. Moving into the R+D space, surrounded by symbols of innovation and human-machine dialogue, I feel invigorated by possibility. There’s an undercurrent of excitement—here, thought is not only allowed to wander, but is actively invited to do so. I am both a participant and an observer in this evolving landscape.
